summary: Matched the Chikorita Pokémon item unit by folding the former itchicoritaleaf source/header into itchicorita, marking itchicorita.c Matching, and updating GALE01 splits/symbols. The PR also refactored duplicated Chikorita physics callbacks through a static inline helper. decomp-dev reported net progress of +368 matched code bytes, +1976 linked code bytes, and +72 linked data bytes; the old itchicoritaleaf unit shows broken matches only because it was removed as a separate object.
what_changed: Merged the previous itchicoritaleaf text/data ranges into itchicorita.c in config/GALE01/splits.txt: .text now spans 0x802C9588-0x802C9D40 and .data spans 0x803F7A98-0x803F7AD8.
Changed configure.py from two NonMatching objects, itchicorita.c and itchicoritaleaf.c, to one Matching object for melee/it/items/itchicorita.c.
Moved the leaf ItemStateTable it_803F7AC8 and leaf routines into itchicorita.c, including it_802C9B20, itChicoritaLeaf_Logic30_* callbacks, it_802C9CC0, and itChicoritaleaf_UnkMotion0_* callbacks.
Expanded itchicorita.h with the leaf prototypes and extern declaration for it_803F7AC8, replacing the removed leaf header.
Removed the itchicoritaleaf.h include from src/melee/it/it_2725.c.
Refactored duplicate itChicorita_UnkMotion0_Phys and itChicorita_UnkMotion1_Phys bodies into static inline itChicorita_Phys with thin exported wrappers.
Changed sdata2 symbols at 0x804DD330 and 0x804DD334 from globals it_804DD330/it_804DD334 to local labels @153 and @274.
smart_moves: Recognized that the leaf article belonged in the same translation unit as Chikorita for matching, then aligned source layout, splits.txt, configure.py, and headers in one PR.
Used a static inline helper for the two identical Chikorita physics callbacks, preserving both public callback symbols while sharing the exact C shape needed for codegen.
Kept address-commented prototypes for the moved leaf functions in itchicorita.h so existing item registration code can include one parent item header.
Updated local/global sdata2 labeling alongside the source move, avoiding stale global symbol names for floats that are now local to the matched object.
Accepted that decomp.dev would list broken matches for the removed itchicoritaleaf unit because the same functions became new matches under itchicorita.
decomp_lessons: When a child article file is contiguous with its parent item in .text/.data and decomp.dev shows progress under the parent object, merging the files can be the correct matching move rather than preserving an artificial split.
For duplicated callbacks, a static inline implementation plus small wrappers can both reduce source duplication and satisfy per-symbol matching.
Small C-shape changes such as ternary sign checks, direct field access through item->xCC_item_attr, and a retained goto label can be relevant to closing near-matches.
Deleting a source/header pair requires synchronized cleanup in includes, exported prototypes, configure.py object lists, and GALE01 split ranges.
sdata2 scope annotations in symbols.txt should be reviewed when changing translation-unit boundaries; local float labels may replace temporary global it_804Dxxxx names.
naming_conventions: Parent item routines use the itChicorita_* prefix, for example itChicorita_UnkMotion0_Phys and itChicorita_UnkMotion2_Coll.
Leaf logic callbacks use itChicoritaLeaf_Logic30_* names, for example itChicoritaLeaf_Logic30_Spawned, HitShield, EvtUnk, and Reflected.
Leaf motion callbacks preserved the existing mixed-case itChicoritaleaf_* spelling, for example itChicoritaleaf_UnkMotion0_Anim.
Unknown/address-based functions remain named by address, such as it_802C9B20 and it_802C9CC0.
Headers retain address comments on declarations, such as /* 2C9B20 */ and /* 3F7AC8 */.
ItemStateTable globals use it_803F7A98 for Chikorita and it_803F7AC8 for the leaf article.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Collapsed itchicorita and itchicoritaleaf into one object to match the full 0x802C9588-0x802C9D40 code range.
Introduced static inline itChicorita_Phys so both itChicorita_UnkMotion0_Phys and itChicorita_UnkMotion1_Phys can emit matching code through wrappers.
Kept the branch-shaping goto label block_11 in the physics helper.
Used direct item->xCC_item_attr field accesses and ternary sign computations instead of extra ItemAttr/fall_speed temporaries in the matched physics code.
Localized .sdata2 float labels @153 and @274 after the translation-unit merge.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the slice.
The decomp-dev bot reported GALE01 matched code 54.48% (+0.01%, +368 bytes), linked code 30.97% (+0.05%, +1976 bytes), and linked data 28.87% (+0.01%, +72 bytes).

The bot listed 13 new matches in main/melee/it/items/itchicorita, including it_802C9B20, itChicoritaLeaf_Logic30_Spawned, itChicoritaleaf_UnkMotion0_Anim, .data, .sdata2, and both Chikorita physics callbacks reaching 100%.
The bot also listed 11 broken matches under main/melee/it/items/itchicoritaleaf, consistent with that object being removed rather than a functional regression.
follow_up_queries: Search for other Pokémon item article files with contiguous .text/.data ranges that may be artificial splits like itchicoritaleaf.
Audit remaining Pokémon item NonMatching objects near itkabigon, itkamex, and itmatadogas for duplicate callbacks that could use static inline wrapper tactics.
Check whether mixed-case itChicoritaleaf_* names should remain as symbol-preserving placeholders until stronger naming evidence exists.
Review nearby sdata2 globals after 0x804DD338 for additional local-label opportunities when later item units are matched.
